title: Tropical Tuscan Egg Frittata
description: A funky, springy frittata that blends Tuscan flavors with a tropical red pepper paste and a hint of tadka, perfect for a raw-friendly lunch.
instructions: Whisk the eggs in a bowl and season with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat and add the garlic, letting it soften for 30 seconds.
Pour in the red pepper paste and stir for one minute to toast the flavors.
Add the sun‑dried tomatoes, oregano, and crushed pepper flakes, cooking for two minutes.
Stir in the spinach and basil until the spinach wilts.
Pour the egg mixture over the vegetables and spread it evenly.
Cook uncovered for 4 minutes until the edges set, then sprinkle the crumbled feta on top.
Cover the skillet with a lid and bake in a preheated 180°C oven for 8 minutes until the frittata is fully set.
Remove, let rest a minute, slice, and serve warm.
